title: Forum Beginner some questions
wikitext:
[]: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by Cobadome » Fri Jan 20, 2017 10:38 am Hello Forum first my english is not so good sorry for that I have some Evangelion questions things that i dont understand complete. 1. Is it right when the seeds of life adam and lilith comes together its the third impact? 2. Seele wants a third impact why they let not the angels in the headquarter fusions with lilith there ? 3. Eva 01 comes from lilith why it comes not to an impact? he has contact in fights with the adam based angels Evangelion is so complex for me but i love this series so much do you have here any full complete storyline or an Link where anything is declared? Thanks and im happy that i found Evageeks.

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Sat Jan 21, 2017 4:11 am Unfortunately these are the $50,000 questions. Fuyutsuki sensei tells us: "The Seed of Life...and the Seed of Wisdom [have been both acquired by Eva Unit 01.] It is [now] equal to God. Will it be an ark to save humanity from the nihil of the Third Impact...or become a demon to annihilate humanity? Our future is up to Ikari's son." And it's up to us to wrinkle out the kinks. I have recently been trying to prove Kaworu has two souls. Welcome to forum.

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 21, 2017 4:40 am I can at least attempt to answer the second question. Seele wants Third Impact, but they want their particular version of Third Impact, which would ideally result in their version of Human Instrumentality. Basically, there's multiple ways Third Impact can play out, and depending on who triggers it/who is in control of it (whether it be an Angel, Seele, Gendo, Shinji, etc), it can have wildly different outcomes. If an Angel were to cause Third Impact, the idea is that all Lilith-based life (aka non-Angelic life) would be eliminated in favor of creating an environment that suited the Angels. Seele's goal with Third Impact was to initiate the Human Instrumentality Project. There's varying ideas on how this would play out (Seele's version of Instrumentality versus Gendo's versus Shinji's), but for all of them, it would essentially result in all human life ceasing to exist in separate, physical forms, instead existing as one collective, each individual's strengths complementing the others weaknesses, resulting in a so-called "more perfect form/being", at the cost of the individual. Based on the way Rebuild has expanded upon the concept of Impacts, it would seem they are planet-wide environmental/climate resets that drastically change the way in which life operates, at the behest of the Impact Trigger. In the original series, Seele actually fully intended to do precisely what you suggested: let an Angel invade Nerv HQ and start Third Impact for them; that Angel was Kaworu. As for the third question: my best answer for that is that Eva Unit-01 lacked an S2 Engine/Organ up until it devoured Zeruel in episode 19, which granted it the Seed of Knowledge, basically giving it the full potential to trigger an Impact. This is why Gendo made such a point to keep Unit-01 out of combat operations after that incident; coming into contact with an Angel at that point would have been dangerous.

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 21, 2017 5:09 am Sachi wrote: Eva Unit-01 lacked an S2 Engine/Organ up until it devoured Zeruel in episode 19, which granted it the Seed of Knowledge,

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 21, 2017 6:53 am Neither; it's called the Fruit of Life. "Seeds" are what Adam and Lilith are.

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 21, 2017 7:07 am Oops - focussing on one error I missed the other!

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by Cobadome » Sat Jan 21, 2017 7:52 am thanks for the answers now its more clear for me eva has so much stuff and theory im thinking all the time about

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 21, 2017 1:32 pm Sachi wrote: Based on the way Rebuild has expanded upon the concept of Impacts, it would seem they are planet-wide environmental/climate resets that drastically change the way in which life operates, at the behest of the Impact Trigger.

[]: Re: Forum Beginner - some questions             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 21, 2017 3:00 pm Reichu wrote: Neither; it's called the Fruit of Life. "Seeds" are what Adam and Lilith are.
